name: Acrow Limited
analysis: ACF's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 17% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (0.8× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$0.9300, stop A$0.8514, target A$1.0570 (1.62:1) — then trail it.
